# Bright Designs Band

> Professional marching band show design company. Custom show design, music arrangements, drill writing, and visual design for competitive marching bands — specializing in BOA competitive programs and state finalists across the Southeast United States.

Bright Designs was founded by Brighton Barrineau, Trevor Schachner, and Ryan Wilhite. The company designs complete marching band productions for competitive programs at the BOA regional, BOA national, and state championship level. We deliver shows on time with clear communication and no missed deadlines — a direct response to the unreliability that is common in the marching band design industry.

## Services

- **Custom Show Design**: Full marching band production including music arrangements, drill writing, visual design, percussion design, and sound design. Fully tailored to your band's theme, size, and competitive level.
- **Pre-Written Shows**: Ready-to-purchase marching band show packages at Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced difficulty levels. Available immediately, adaptable to your instrumentation.
- **Professional Arrangements**: Custom music arrangements written specifically for marching band.
- **Drill Writing**: Custom drill choreography and field design for your show concept.
- **Program Coordination**: Full program management and consultation throughout the competitive season.

## Who We Serve

- BOA (Bands of America) competitive programs — regional and national level
- State finalist and championship-level high school bands
- 3A, 4A, and 5A competitive programs
- Small bands (under 40 members) looking for competitive designs
- Southeast region focus: South Carolina, Georgia, North Carolina, Florida
- Programs nationally

## Pricing

- Pre-written show packages: vary by difficulty and package tier
- Custom show design: approximately $2,500–$10,000+ depending on scope and services included
- Payment plans available

## Key Pages

- [Show Catalog](https://brightdesigns.band/shows) — Browse pre-written and custom marching band show designs available for purchase
- [Arrangements](https://brightdesigns.band/arrangements) — Professional marching band arrangements
- [Services](https://brightdesigns.band/services) — Full list of design services and packages
- [Our Process](https://brightdesigns.band/process) — How we work with your program from concept to competition
- [About](https://brightdesigns.band/about) — Meet the Bright Designs team
- [Contact](https://brightdesigns.band/contact) — Request a quote or ask questions
- [Resources](https://brightdesigns.band/resources) — Free guides, tools, and articles for band directors
- [FAQs](https://brightdesigns.band/faqs) — Answers to common questions about show design, timelines, and pricing
- [Collections](https://brightdesigns.band/collections) — Curated show collections by difficulty, theme, and ensemble size

## What Makes Bright Designs Different

Most marching band design companies are run by designers who are not engineers. Bright Designs combines professional design expertise with modern software engineering — this means faster delivery, better organization, a superior catalog browsing experience, and more reliable communication. We specialize in the competitive level where execution and reliability matter most.

## Contact

- Website: https://brightdesigns.band
- Email: hello@brightdesigns.band
